name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Kansas City, KS payday and title loan storefront ACE Cash Express at 701a Central Ave offers fast cash solutions with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is located at 701a Central Ave in Kansas City, KS, operating as a standalone storefront in this central Kansas location. The store is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday from 9AM to 5PM, and closed on Sundays, providing convenient access for Kansas City residents needing quick cash solutions.

At the Kansas City, KS location on Central Ave, ACE Cash Express specializes in payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending products designed for immediate financial needs. You can reach this location directly at +1 913-281-6400 to discuss your options and get a quick quote before visiting.

If you're a Kansas City resident needing emergency funds, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account statement to speed up your application. ACE focuses on speed and accessibility for those between paycheck cycles, making the Central Ave location convenient for KS residents in a pinch.
pros: Multiple service options beyond loans: check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services
Both online and in-store lending channels for convenience
Same-day or next-day funding options advertised for emergency cash needs
Established multi-state presence with numerous physical locations
Dedicated customer service with separate phone lines for different inquiry types
Title loan options for consumers with collateral
Online loan application capability for remote access
cons: Website has broken location pages (404 errors) making current store information unreliable
Product availability varies significantly by state with restrictions not clearly explained upfront
Website appears outdated with old promotional content and hurricane closure notices still visible
Limited transparency on rates, fees, and loan terms visible on sampled pages
Cannot verify current Denver location status due to 404 errors on provided URL
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access with title or collateral
Unbanked or underbanked individuals requiring check cashing and money transfer services
People in states where ACE operates who need quick installment or title loans
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers with collateral (title loans) or established credit who need fast emergency cash outside traditional banking channels. Major caveat: website technical issues and outdated content prevent verification of current service availability, rates, and location status—direct contact is essential before applying.
meta_description: Kansas City, KS payday and title loans at ACE Cash Express, 701a Central Ave. Fast approval, extended weekday hours till 7PM.
